Warmup question

[1] "What did you do during Golden Week?"
name answer
TAKAHASHI SAKI I went to a big venue and enjoyed a music event for two days.
SAKAE AKARI I went to Nagano and Gunma with my family.
KUJIRAOKA SERA I went to Nagoya to see my aunt. I ate “Hitumabushi“ there. It was very nice!
SAKANASHI KANO I met my grand parents and work at part time job.
CHIKUMA KAHO I had been done part-time jobs in GW.
KIMURA HARUA I did my part time job. And I ate dinner with my high school friends.
YOSHIZAWA NONOKA I made a fruit tart, and my mother made scones and sandwiches, and we had afternoon tea at home.
YAJIMA KOUDAI I drove a car
SAWADA MANATO I went on a trip with my friends.
YUZAWA SANA I went to Minatomirai.And I watched movie outside. Watching a movie with many people outside while sitting on a picnic sheet was very fun. We ate pizza and snacks, and it felt like a picnic.
ONISHI NANAKA I work part time every day. The restaurant was very busy.
AKIYAMA RURUKO I went to all-you-can-eat bread and my friends’ live.
TEZUKA ASUMI I went to Yokohama and enjoyed sightseeing.
FUKAYA MINA I do my part-time job and I ate dinner with my grandma.
TAKEMOTO MEIBI I went to shopping with my friend and buy some clothes.
MATSUHISA HONOKA I visited my grandparents house
SAITOU MIREI I went to Ibaraki Prefecture to meet my grand parents.
OTANI WASEI I played fencing almost every day.
KIHARA MOE I sang a song and watched the movie with my friends for elementary school. I also worked at part time job.
KONDO AN I practiced lacrosse every day.
ABE HIKARI It was fan. I enjoy choir clab.
KOJIMA TAKUMI I went to Thailand.
